_doc: Verbatim uip CLI responses captured from the source session. Matches are core uip subcommand substrings — the troubleshoot agent's shared.md redirect-to-raw pipeline wraps these in `> .local/.../raw.json && head -c N`, but the dispatcher's substring match still catches the wrapped form. docsai queries proxy to the live CLI per tests/tasks/uipath-troubleshoot/CLAUDE.md.

rules._doc: Proxy any docsai query to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
